name: AnnotationType
summary: ON::AnnotationType identifies the type of an annotation object derived from ON_Annotation.

enum_values.name: Aligned
enum_values.summary: Linear distance between two points with dimension line parallel to the dimensioned points.

enum_values.name: Rotated
enum_values.summary: Linear distance between two points with dimension line horizontal, vertical or rotated by a specified amount.

enum_values.name: Ordinate
enum_values.summary: Ordinate dimension. Typically used to document an offset distance between the center of a circle and a reference point.

enum_values.name: CenterMark
enum_values.summary: Center mark dimension. Typically used to document the center of an arc or circle.

enum_values.name: Text
enum_values.summary: Text. Stand alone text with a wide variety of uses.

enum_values.name: Leader
enum_values.summary: Leader. Text and a curve with an arrow head.
